name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement
title: "[Feature] "

---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve?

## Proposed behavior

Describe what the user should be able to do.

## Why it belongs in this project

Explain why this fits a local HEIC-to-JPG converter.

## Safety considerations

Could this change overwrite files, delete photos, expose private data, or make recovery harder?

## Smallest useful version

Describe the smallest responsible implementation.
